maml:description.maml:para: List compute customers per contract.
Returns IDs and names of compute customers for the specified contract.
The ID of the contract that you want to see aggregated data from.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
The ID of the contract that you want to see aggregated data from.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
Get compute usage summary per contract and compute customer.

Returns the near real-time compute usage summary of the specified contract and compute customer, for the current month. Compute usage data is available with a latency of up to two hours. The response shows a number of unbilled hours or GBs, while your final bill also includes the monthly capping. Note that your final bill also includes overages for transfer and object storage, computed towards the end of the month.
The ID of the contract that you want to see aggregated data from.
Uniquely identifies the compute customer whose data you want to see. Run the List compute customers per contract (ref:get-compute-customers)operation to get the compute customer ID.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Uniquely identifies the compute customer whose data you want to see. Run the List compute customers per contract (ref:get-compute-customers)operation to get the compute customer ID.
The ID of the contract that you want to see aggregated data from.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
Get daily compute usage.

Returns daily usage data per contract and compute customer account in 24-hour blocks aligned to ET (Eastern Time) billing days. It follows the FOCUS standard (https://focus.finops.org/) specification. Data includes a daily cost breakdown per instance based on list price. It doesn't reflect discounts, credits, or network transfer pooling adjustments. These will be included in your final invoice. Available data formats are `CSV`, `JSON`, and `Parquet`.The API returns usage from `00:00:00` to `23:59:59.999` Eastern Time (ET) on the date you specify. This corresponds either to Eastern Daylight Time (EDT, UTC-4), active during Daylight Saving Time (approximately March-November), or Eastern Standard Time (EST, UTC-5), active during Standard Time (approximately November-March).Run this operation to get compute usage from the previous ET day only. To ensure the data is fully finalized, call the API after 2:00 AM ET on the next day, which corresponds to 06:00 UTC when EDT is active or to 07:00 UTC when EST is active. Avoid calling the API between 00:00 and 02:00 ET, as data consolidation may still be in progress.If you prefer to call the API at a fixed UTC time irrespective of daylight saving changes, you can safely schedule it post 07:00 UTC, which always occurs after data finalization in both EDT and EST periods.
The ID of the contract that you want to see aggregated data from.
Uniquely identifies the compute customer whose data you want to see. Run the List compute customers per contract (ref:get-compute-customers)operation to get the compute customer ID.

Specifies the date for the daily usage query in the ISO 8601 format (`YYYY-MM-DD`). The returned usage is from `00:00:00` to `23:59:59.999` Eastern Time (ET) on the specified `date`. When EDT (UTC-4) is active, the usage is from `04:00:00.000Z` on the specified `date` to `03:59:59.999Z` on `date+1` (UTC). When EST (UTC-5) is active, the usage is from `05:00:00.000Z` on the specified `date` to `04:59:59.999Z` on `date+1` (UTC). See the examples (ref:workflows#list-daily-compute-usage).
Specifies a page number for the results, starting at 1. Use in conjunction with `pageSize`.
Specifies the number of results per page. Use in conjunction with `page`.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Uniquely identifies the compute customer whose data you want to see. Run the List compute customers per contract (ref:get-compute-customers)operation to get the compute customer ID.
The ID of the contract that you want to see aggregated data from.

Specifies the date for the daily usage query in the ISO 8601 format (`YYYY-MM-DD`). The returned usage is from `00:00:00` to `23:59:59.999` Eastern Time (ET) on the specified `date`. When EDT (UTC-4) is active, the usage is from `04:00:00.000Z` on the specified `date` to `03:59:59.999Z` on `date+1` (UTC). When EST (UTC-5) is active, the usage is from `05:00:00.000Z` on the specified `date` to `04:59:59.999Z` on `date+1` (UTC). See the examples (ref:workflows#list-daily-compute-usage).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
Specifies a page number for the results, starting at 1. Use in conjunction with `pageSize`.
Specifies the number of results per page. Use in conjunction with `page`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
Get usage products per contract.

Gets IDs and names of the billable usage products for the specified contract and the selected time frame. If you have products that are billed geographically, you can see monthly usage statistics by region.
The ID of the contract that you want to see aggregated data from.
The start (inclusive) of the billable usage period, expressed as an ISO 8601 datestamp (YYYY-MM).
The end (exclusive) of the billable usage period, expressed as an ISO 8601 datestamp (YYYY-MM).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
The ID of the contract that you want to see aggregated data from.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The end (exclusive) of the billable usage period, expressed as an ISO 8601 datestamp (YYYY-MM).
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
The start (inclusive) of the billable usage period, expressed as an ISO 8601 datestamp (YYYY-MM).
Get cumulative daily usage per contract and product.
Gets cumulative daily usage details of the specified contract and product for the selected month. If you have products that are billed geographically, you can see monthly usage statistics by region.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
The ID of the contract that you want to see aggregated data from.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
Selected billable usage period, expressed as an ISO 8601 datestamp (YYYY-MM).
The ID of the product you want to see aggregated data for.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
Selected billable usage period, expressed as an ISO 8601 datestamp (YYYY-MM).
The ID of the product you want to see aggregated data for.
The ID of the reporting group that you want to see aggregated data for.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
The ID of the contract that you want to see aggregated data from.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
Selected billable usage period, expressed as an ISO 8601 datestamp (YYYY-MM).
The ID of the product you want to see aggregated data for.
The ID of the reporting group that you want to see aggregated data for.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
Get monthly usage summary per contract and product.

Gets monthly usage summary details of the specified contract and product for the selected time frame. If you have products that are billed geographically, you can see monthly usage statistics by region.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Return usage data by a Content Provider code.
The ID of the contract that you want to see aggregated data from.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The end (exclusive) of the billable usage period, expressed as an ISO 8601 datestamp (YYYY-MM).
The ID of the product you want to see aggregated data for.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
The start (inclusive) of the billable usage period, expressed as an ISO 8601 datestamp (YYYY-MM).

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The end (exclusive) of the billable usage period, expressed as an ISO 8601 datestamp (YYYY-MM).
The ID of the product you want to see aggregated data for.
The ID of the reporting group that you want to see aggregated data for.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
The start (inclusive) of the billable usage period, expressed as an ISO 8601 datestamp (YYYY-MM).

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Return usage data by a Content Provider code.
The ID of the contract that you want to see aggregated data from.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The end (exclusive) of the billable usage period, expressed as an ISO 8601 datestamp (YYYY-MM).
The ID of the product you want to see aggregated data for.
The ID of the reporting group that you want to see aggregated data for.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
The start (inclusive) of the billable usage period, expressed as an ISO 8601 datestamp (YYYY-MM).
Download subcustomer geobilling files.

Provides details on subcustomer invoicing for each geographic zone within the Akamai network for Akamai Cloud Embed. The downloadable file is available in the response body, formatted as a gzip-compressed CSV.
The ID of the contract that you want to see aggregated data from.
The ID of the product you want to see aggregated data for.
The day for which you want to see aggregated data. You need to specify corresponding `-Month` and `-Year` values.
Selected billable usage period, expressed as an ISO 8601 datestamp (YYYY-MM).
The year for which you want to see aggregated data. You need to specify corresponding `-Month` and `-Day` values.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
The ID of the contract that you want to see aggregated data from.
The day for which you want to see aggregated data. You need to specify corresponding `-Month` and `-Year` values.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
Selected billable usage period, expressed as an ISO 8601 datestamp (YYYY-MM).
The ID of the product you want to see aggregated data for.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
The year for which you want to see aggregated data. You need to specify corresponding `-Month` and `-Day` values.
